title: Chapter 47
content:
Chapter 47: Chapter 47: Eternal Bond

[Ding!]

[The Heavenly White Tiger Initiating Eternal Bond.]

[Would you like to accept?]

’Eternal bond? It means it want to bond with me forever...’

A divine beasts cannot be tame that that the common knowledge base on the memories he got. Even you call it bond, it’s more like begging, human just asking something like protection or blood to upgrade their bloodline, since divine beast have more Intelligence even than spiritual beast.

They know what they are and what they capable the moment the born. Divine beasts are more like guardian of the world. but now a Heavenly White Tiger asking him to be bond with, its eternal one at that.

Before he accepts, looked at the tiger cub a ask.

"You want to bond with me? Are you sure? You know once we bond you will be with me forever."

Hearing this the tiger cub nodded eagerly, like it didn’t care of the consequence. Even the tiger knows what it was, but the tiger doesn’t have memories where it came from and even it went alone, it doesn’t know where to go or anything about outside world.

Better to follow the man that help it escape that wander around. Plus, with that mysterious lightning, the tiger sure it was the best decision.

"Okay, I got it." Damon accepts the bond.

A brilliant, blinding radiance surrounded them entirely, weaving an ancient, shimmering pact together.

[Please give it a name.]

"A name, huh..."

Damon looks at the tiger; it looks more like a cat than a tiger.

"How about Neko?" he asks the tiger cub its opinion.

The tiger cub tilted it head, and point it paw toward itself.

"Yes, you, how about Neko for your name?"

The tiger cub stays still in Damon arms silently, its gaze still fixated on Damon, seemingly in deep thoughts. Then it nodded it head.

[Eternal Bond with Heavenly White Tiger has been successfully formed.]

"Good, from now on you are Neko. Let’s get along, I’m Damon." Damon then lift it up with a smile on his lips.

Suddenly Damon feel wat it wants.

"Ohh, you want to see my lightning?" Damon ask Neko.

It nodded furiously. Then Damon forms a lighting in his palm using Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art.

The moment lightning appears on Damon hand; It’s body shiver with excitement. The it opens it mouth and suck all the lightning.

’So, it got hungry, but to use eternal bond to ask for food is a bit...’

Damon continues pumping out his lightning until Neko suddenly shine in bright white, blue light.

"Meow!"

As it released a low cry, its small figure began transforming.

"T-This is..."

Damon’s eyes widened, his gaze filled with surprise as he witnessed the Tiger cub’s body grow larger and taller — until it resembled a human’s figure.

While he knew that a divine or spiritual beasts were capable of turning into humans after reaching certain Cultivation bases, but to transform now is... weird.

A few moments later, Neko no longer resembled anything like a cat or a tiger. Instead, it’d become a human being the only trace that indicate it was a beast was its cat ears on it hair and a swaying tail on it back.

However...

"A child?" Damon did not expect the Neko to take the appearance of a child.

Surprisingly, the Neko had transformed into a young girl that looks around the age of 13 or 14! And she was breathtakingly beautiful to the boot!

With long, wavey silver-colored hair and sharp silver eyes. And if closely inspected, one would be able to see that her hair was slightly moving, just like her fur in her beast form, almost as though it was alive.

Then a status appears in front of Damon.

[Name: Neko]

[Species: Heavenly White Tiger]

[Age: 140]

[Cultivation: ???]

[Relationship: Eternal Bond]

[Chastity: Intact]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Lightning: 500]

[Spiritual Roots: Heavenly Lightning Spiritual Roots] [???]

[Bloodline: Blood of Heavenly White Tiger] [??? Grade]

[Physique: Body of Heavenly White Tiger] [??? Grade]

[Traits: Curious, Innocent, Playful]

’What the...? A more question mark?’

"Master!" Damon can hear a cute childish voice, as Neko jump at him and hug him.

"Now that you are in your human form, can you speak the human language?" Damon asked her.

"Yes!" Neko answered Damon excitedly.

He then looked at the beautiful young girl that hugged him, who was also stark naked from top to bottom without even a single strand of hair on her body.

Seeing this all happen at once he asks the system.

System, what just happen?

[It was due to the bond and the lightning that host given to her. Host, use Heavenly Tribulation Lightning Art. As you know, the Heavenly White Tiger can only grow with Heavenly Tribulation Lightning, as you give it to her, she is now able to transform into human form.]

’Wait, didn’t you said I can’t produce Heavenly Tribulation Lightning with my current affinities? And why a child form?’

[Yes, but after you bond with Neko, your lightning affinities increase. Her form is a child because her current state of her body even she over 100 years, but because of lack of Heavenly Tribulation Lightning she remains in her cub form. As she grows stronger with host feeding her host’s lightning, her tiger from will change and it also can change the human from if she wants to.]

’I see so she basically an adult stuck in child body...’

Then the system shows his new status.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Second Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 60, Water: 60, Ice: 60, Wind: 60, Lightning: 310, Earth: 60, Nature: 60, Light: 60, Dark: 60, Sword: 100] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Earth Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 176,710]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes]
